# `nise deactivate`

- **Usage**: `nise deactivate`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/deactivate.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/deactivate.rs)

Disable nise for current shell session

This can be used to temporarily disable nise in a shell session.

Examples:

```
$ nise deactivate
```
